blended.narrative: Poley Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
